title: Pan-Seared Foie Gras with Slovak Skewers
description: A rich and indulgent dish featuring seared foie gras paired with crispy Slovak-style meat skewers.
instructions: 2. Season foie gras with salt and pepper.
3. Sear foie gras for 2-3 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 130°F (54°C).
4. Meanwhile, thread pork and beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush skewers with olive oil and season with mild paprika, garlic, salt, and pepper.
6. Grill or pan-fry skewers until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes per side.
7. Serve foie gras with Slovak-style skewers and garnish with fresh herbs.
